name: python3-libfsxfs
title: python3-libfsxfs
summary: llibrary to access the SGI X File System -- Python 3 bindings
description:
llibrary to access the SGI X File System -- Python 3 bindings
libfsxfs is a library to access the SGI X File System (XFS).
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libfsxfs.
